auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ShipEngine API key used as the API-Key header. Create or manage keys from ShipEngine account settings: https://www.shipengine.com/docs/auth/

actions.name: calculate_rates
actions.description: Calculate shipping rates for a shipment request using connected ShipEngine carriers.

rateOptions.description: The rate_options object passed to ShipEngine.

shipment.description: The shipment object passed to ShipEngine.

inputSchema.description: The ShipEngine calculate rates request body.

rateResponse.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when calculating ShipEngine rates.

actions.name: estimate_rates
actions.description: Estimate shipping rates with basic address and package information.

carrierIds.description: The ShipEngine carrier IDs to use for the estimate.

fromCountryCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the address.

fromPostalCode.description: The origin postal code for the estimate.

toCountryCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the address.

toPostalCode.description: The destination postal code for the estimate.

weight.description: The package weight object passed to ShipEngine.

inputSchema.description: The ShipEngine estimate rates request body.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

rates.description: The estimated rates returned by ShipEngine.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when estimating ShipEngine rates.

actions.name: get_rate
actions.description: Retrieve a previously queried ShipEngine rate by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a ShipEngine rate.

rate.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a ShipEngine rate.

actions.name: list_carriers
actions.description: List carrier accounts connected to the ShipEngine account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ShipEngine carriers.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

carriers.description: The carrier accounts returned by ShipEngine.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

errors.description: Partial-success errors returned by ShipEngine when present.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ShipEngine carriers.

actions.name: parse_address
actions.description: Parse unstructured text into a structured ShipEngine address.

text.description: The unstructured text that contains address information.

name.description: The known recipient or contact name for the address.

phone.description: The known phone number associated with the address.

companyName.description: The known company name associated with the address.

cityLocality.description: The known city or locality for the address.

stateProvince.description: The known state, province, or region for the address.

postalCode.description: The known postal or ZIP code for the address.

countryCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the address.

addressResidentialIndicator.description: Whether ShipEngine should treat the address as residential.

address.description: Optional known ShipEngine address fields to help parse unstructured text.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for parsing a ShipEngine address.

parsedAddress.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when parsing a ShipEngine address.

actions.name: validate_addresses
actions.description: Validate one or more mailing addresses with ShipEngine and return deliverability details.

name.description: The recipient or contact name for the address.

phone.description: The phone number associated with the address.

companyName.description: The company name associated with the address.

cityLocality.description: The city or locality for the address.

stateProvince.description: The state, province, or region for the address.

postalCode.description: The postal or ZIP code for the address.

countryCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the address.

addressResidentialIndicator.description: Whether ShipEngine should treat the address as residential.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for validating ShipEngine addresses.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipEngine.

addresses.description: The validated address results returned by ShipEngine.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when validating ShipEngine addresses.
